faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Spuyten Duyvil typically costs between $350 and $650, depending on the size of your home or apartment and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any treatment.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day flea treatment services throughout Spuyten Duyvil and the surrounding Bronx areas. Our team understands the urgency of flea infestations and works to accommodate your schedule as quickly as possible.

faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved, pet-safe flea treatment products that are highly effective yet safe for your family and animals. faqs.answer: Absolutely. We stand behind our flea treatments with a satisfaction guarantee.
